game_name: Chuck Rock II: Son of Chuck

influences: contemporary acid jazz bands (as thanked in end credits)
Ozric Tentacles (referenced in boss character name)

notes.documentation_limitations: Wikipedia source does not provide specific tempo, key, chord progression, or detailed SFX characteristics data. Only confirms composer (Martin Iveson for Genesis version) and overall musical style (acid jazz). Alternative composers listed: Matt Furniss (Master System/Genesis/Game Gear versions at Krisalis Software Ltd), Nathan McCree (co-composed Sega CD version with Iveson). No area-specific or track-level musical parameters documented.
